actions.script: async function fetchSearchHTML(e,t={}){const{hl:r="",gl:s="",client:n="safari",sort_by:o="",time_period:i="",device:c="",location:u=""}=t,a=new URLSearchParams({q:e,hl:r,gl:s,client:n});if(u){const e=getUuleParameter(u);a.append("uule",e)}o&&a.append("sort",o),i&&a.append("tbs","qdr:"+i),c&&a.append("tbm","mobile"===c?"nws-mob":"nws");const l="https://www.google.com/search?"+a.toString()+"&tbm=isch";try{const e=await fetch(l);if(!e.ok)throw new Error("HTTP error! status: "+e.status);return await e.text()}catch(e){throw console.error("Error fetching search HTML:",e),e}}function getUuleParameter(e){const t=(new TextEncoder).encode(e),r=String.fromCharCode(t.length);return"w+CAIQICI"+btoa(r+e)}function extractTitle(e){const t=/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/g;let r,s="";for(;null!==(r=t.exec(e));)s=r[1].trim();return s}function extractResultCount(e){var t=-1;const r=[/About ([\d,\.]+) results?/i,/(\d[\d,\.]*)\s+results?/i,/"resultStats"[^>]*>About ([\d,\.]+)/i,/"resultStats"[^>]*>([\d,\.]+)\s+results?/i,/id="result-stats"[^>]*>About ([\d,\.]+)/i,/id="result-stats"[^>]*>([\d,\.]+)\s+results?/i,/>([\d,\.]+)\s+results?\s+\(/i];for(const s of r){const r=s.exec(e);if(r&&r[1]){t=r[1].replace(/[,\.]/g,"");break}}return t}function extractImageResults(e,t='div[data-attrid="images universal"]'){const r=e.querySelectorAll(t),s=[];return r.forEach(((e,t)=>{const r={};r.position=t+1;const n=e.querySelector("a.EZAeBe")||e.querySelector("a");r.link=n?.href||"N/A";const o=e.querySelector(".toI8Rb")||e.querySelector("h3");r.title=o?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const i=e.querySelector(".guK3rf span");r.domain=i?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const c=e.querySelector("img.YQ4gaf");r.image=c?.src||"N/A",r.width=c?.width||"N/A",r.height=c?.height||"N/A";const u=e.querySelector("a.EZAeBe"),a=i?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";let l="N/A";try{l=new URL(u?.href||"").hostname}catch(e){}r.source={link:u?.href||"N/A",domain:l,name:a},s.push(r)})),s}async function processQuery(e,t={}){try{const r="object"==typeof e&&null!==e?e.query:e,s="object"==typeof e&&null!==e?e.query_id:void 0,n=await fetchSearchHTML(r,void 0,t),o=(new DOMParser).parseFromString(n,"text/html"),i={success:!0,query:r,query_id:s,title:extractTitle(n),serp_result_count:extractResultCount(n),image_results:extractImageResults(o)},c=Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(i).filter((([e,t])=>null!==t&&!(Array.isArray(t)&&0===t.length))));return c.image_results?.length>0?c:{error:!0,query:r,query_id:s,message:"No meaningful content found in result , Request limit reached out"}}catch(t){return{success:!1,query:"object"==typeof e&&null!==e?e.query:e,query_id:"object"==typeof e&&null!==e?e.query_id:void 0,error:t.message}}}function withTimeout(e,t,r,s){return Promise.race([e,new Promise((e=>setTimeout((()=>e({query:r})),t)))])} var serpOpts={hl:'${hl}',gl:'${gl}',sort_by:'${sort_by}',time_period:'${time_period}',device:'${device}',location:'${location}'}; var res=await processQuery('${query}',serpOpts); return JSON.stringify(res);
